headline: SNPD ETF Targets Next Dividend Aristocrats With 10-year Growth Screen
summary: The SNPD ETF (NYSEARCA:SNPD) takes a narrower path than the standard Dividend Aristocrats index. Instead of requiring 25 years of consecutive dividend hikes, SNPD uses a 10-year minimum dividend growth screen to identify companies on the runway toward Aristocrat status. For income investors, that distinction matters: SNPD owns both seasoned Kings and the next generation ... SNPD ETF Targets Next Dividend Aristocrats With 10-year Growth Screen

headline: How Susie Wolff became a driving force for women in racing, Formula One
summary: F1 Academy managing director Susie Wolff — alongside PepsiCo (PEP) executive vice president Jane Wakely — speaks with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi at the 2026 Cannes Lions International Festival of Creativity to discuss her background as a Formula One driver and how she is paving the way for women in racing in her own league. Wakely is also PepsiCo's chief consumer and marketing officer and chief growth officer for international foods.

headline: The Portfolio That Quietly Pays For Two Cruises Every Year
summary: Most retirees treat cruise fares like an occasional splurge funded from cash on hand or a withdrawal from the portfolio. There is another way to frame the same expense: build an income stream that quietly pays for two trips every year, leaving the principal untouched. Three Budgets, Four Yields The core equation is the same ... The Portfolio That Quietly Pays For Two Cruises Every Year

headline: PepsiCo's Q2 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: PepsiCo is set to announce its second-quarter earnings next month, and Wall Street expects the company’s EPS to increase by a single digit.

headline: The Hershey Company Names Heather Hoytink President, US
summary: The Hershey Company (NYSE: HSY) today announced that Heather Hoytink has been named President, U.S., effective July 8, 2026. Hoytink brings more than 20 years of sales, operations and commercial leadership experience, most recently as Senior Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer, U.S. Away From Home Beverages at PepsiCo.
